brands.name: Ray-Ban
brands.description: The world's most iconic sunglass brand, known for the Aviator, Wayfarer, and Clubmaster. Ray-Ban blends timeless style with premium UV protection.

brands.name: Neutrogena
brands.description: Trusted by dermatologists worldwide, Neutrogena delivers clinically proven skincare and sun protection solutions for every skin type.

brands.name: Oakley
brands.description: Oakley pushes the boundaries of performance eyewear and apparel with cutting-edge optics and bold designs for athletes and outdoor enthusiasts.

brands.name: Havaianas
brands.description: Since 1962, Havaianas has been crafting the world's most beloved flip flops from Brazil — colorful, comfortable, and built for summer.

brands.name: YETI
brands.description: YETI makes premium coolers, drinkware, and outdoor gear built tough for every summer adventure — from beach days to mountain trails.

brands.name: Speedo
brands.description: The global leader in competitive and recreational swimwear since 1914. Speedo's technology-driven designs help swimmers perform their best.
